title: Show-stopping performances in school melodrama
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Following the theme \"Local is Lekker\", educators of six schools in Mossel Bay took to the stage to dance their hearts out at the Mossel Bay Town Hall last night, 5 November in a \"melodrama\".","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Following the theme \"Local is Lekker\", educators of six schools in Mossel Bay took to the stage to dance their hearts out at the Mossel Bay Town Hall last night, 5 November in a \"melodrama\"."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Point High School, Diaz Primary, Erika Primary, Ridgeview Primary, Hartenbos Primary and Park Primary School performed to the familiar sounds of South African music, appropriately dressed in South African attire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From Springbok rugby shirts to traditional clothing representing our multi-cultural society, South Africa's flag flew high throughout the evening.","html":"From Springbok rugby shirts to traditional clothing representing our multi-cultural society, South Africa's flag flew high throughout the evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Diaz Primary School dressed in t-shirts bearing the South African flag. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Diaz Primary School dressed in t-shirts bearing the South African flag. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The evening was filled with fun, laughter and enthusiastic cheers from the audience and despite an unforeseen technical glitch during the second act, spirits were not dampened.","html":"The evening was filled with fun, laughter and enthusiastic cheers from the audience and despite an unforeseen technical glitch during the second act, spirits were not dampened."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Also in attendance at this year's melodrama was Mossel Bay Mayor Dirk Kotzé.","html":"Also in attendance at this year's melodrama was Mossel Bay Mayor Dirk Kotzé."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The first melodrama took place in 2024 at the Diaz Hotel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The schools will be performing again tonight, 6 November. Tickets are available at the door.","html":"The schools will be performing again tonight, 6 November. Tickets are available at the door."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
